description: MCP Server for interacting with GrowthBook

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.growthbook/growthbook-mcp

environmentVariables.description: A GrowthBook API key or PAT.
environmentVariables.name: GB_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Your email address used with GrowthBook. Used when creating feature flags and experiments.
environmentVariables.name: GB_EMAIL

environmentVariables.description: Your GrowthBook API URL. Defaults to `https://api.growthbook.io`.
environmentVariables.name: GB_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Your GrowthBook app URL Defaults to `https://app.growthbook.io`.
environmentVariables.name: GB_APP_ORIGIN

environmentVariables.description: Custom HTTP headers to include in all GrowthBook API requests. Use the pattern GB_HTTP_HEADER_<NAME> where <NAME> is converted to proper HTTP header format. Examples: GB_HTTP_HEADER_X_TENANT_ID=abc123, GB_HTTP_HEADER_CF_ACCESS_TOKEN=<token>. Multiple custom headers can be configured.
environmentVariables.name: GB_HTTP_HEADER_*
